content.en:
"In the Infinite Domain, the Ninth Strange Land Xuanlin Mountain Realm is subordinate to Taisu Palace, and the Eighth Strange Land Blood Fang Ruins is similar to the Ninth Strange Land, belonging to the three Holy Lands of Hatredless Holy Land, Void Mist Holy Land and Linlong Holy Land. "

Ye Tian's goal was to enter the Eighth Strange Land Blood Tooth Ruins, but this Blood Fang Ruins would only be opened once in a long time, and even if he wanted to, he couldn't get in.

The point is that this matter can't be asked to Taisu Palace.

In the eyes of Taisu Palace, he was still trapped in the third-level battlefield True Dao Domain, and he couldn't get out.

Otherwise, Taisu Palace would have arranged for him to enter the Xuanlin Mountain Realm a long time ago.

After all, Taisu Gong didn't know that he had been in the Xuanlin Mountain Realm for a long time.

Therefore, in a short period of time, he could not enter the Bloody Fang Ruins.

Ye Tian investigated it and found that only the seventh strange land that could only be entered was the seventh strange land dragon Yin Ling.

The Dragon Yin Realm is controlled by the Wuji Heavenly Palace, and only the Supreme Dao Realm of the Wuji Heavenly Palace can enter the Dragon Yin Domain, and if other Supreme Dao Realms trespass into the Dragon Yin Territory without permission, or even close to the entrance of the Dragon Yin Domain, they will be killed.

In the vicinity of this strange place, the Wuji Heavenly Palace sent the Wuji Heavenly Army to guard it, and there were three of the sixfold Dao realms alone, and there were many fivefold Dao realms.

The point is that there is also a Sevenfold Dao Realm Heavenly Venerable who is not far from the vicinity of the Dragon Yin Realm, and can come to support at any time.

Ye Tian was not going to trespass on the Dragon Yin Territory, but it was no problem to kill a Wuji Heavenly Palace to the Dao Realm, and then copy the other party's body and apply to enter the Dragon Yin Territory as the other party.

Even if Wuji Heavenly Palace found out afterwards, he couldn't imagine that he did it.

"Just do it!"

Ye Tian then began to have other replica bodies investigate and find suitable targets.

this day.

Ye Tian found a target - the Twofold Dao Realm Hai Qi, one of the descendants of a Quadruple Dao Realm of the Wuji Heavenly Palace, his status was not high, but he was also qualified to apply for the Dragon Yin Realm.

Ye Tian took advantage of the other party's outing, silently and directly erased the other party, quickly copied the other party's identity, and then took the other party's belongings to apply for entering the Dragon Yin Collar.

Soon.

The application is approved.

Then, Ye Tian came directly to Long Yinling.

Here, teams of Wuji Heavenly Army patrol back and forth.

Ye Tian was very indifferent, and after passing the inspection, he entered the Dragon Yin Collar.

......

"Come in!"

Ye Tian was in a good mood.

After entering here, even if the Wuji Heavenly Palace found out that Hai Xin was dead, just because he died in the Dragon Yin Domain, he would not really investigate carefully, and he would not have any suspicions.

Compared with the Xuanlin Mountain Realm, the grade here is much higher, and the Triple Dao Realm can enter here at a certain price, but the strength will be suppressed very strongly, and it will not even be able to stay for a long time.

And the most powerful supreme Dao strange thing here is not the fourfold supreme Dao realm, but the five-fold supreme Dao realm.

The Fifth Rank Dao Realm Supreme Dao Strange Thing, the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules contained in it are naturally more powerful, if it is killed, then the fragments containing the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules will naturally be better, and one piece may be worth the previous dozen or even more pieces.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian went deep into the Dragon Yin Domain, and after coming to the depths of the Dragon Yin Domain, he immediately began to copy his true body.

Soon.

Ye Tian's true body copied and the body condensed successfully.

At this time, he copied two more real bodies, one to collect the resources here, and one as a backup.

After that, Ye Tian began to look for resources and strange things.

Soon.

He came across the Supreme Dao Strange Thing, the Fourfold Dao Realm This level of combat power is a Supreme Dao Strange Thing.

He casually killed this Dao Strange Artifact and obtained a fragment of the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item.

Moreover, the resources here are also very rich, Ye Tian continues to collect resources, and the harvest is very large.

These resources can be used to improve his cultivation, which can allow him to ascend to the mid-level realm of the Dual Realm faster.

this day.

Ye Tian encountered a Dao curiosity comparable to the Fivefold Dao Realm in the depths of the Dragon Yin Realm-the Linglong Spear!

Rumble!!!

As soon as the Linglong Spear appeared, the terrifying eighth sequence of supreme dao rules permeated, and the terrifying aura was enough to make it difficult for those fourfold supreme dao realms to have the idea of fighting.

"A very strong Supreme Dao Strange Thing, no less than the top Fivefold Supreme Dao Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

His true body can suppress this supreme artifact, but if you want to kill it, it will take some time, or besiege it!

Airplanes!

Ye Tian's other true body copy body rushed over, and he was still copying other real body copy bodies.

Next, a big battle begins!

Thundered!!!!!

Several of Ye Tian's true bodies copied their bodies to besiege the Linglong Spear to the Dao Strange Things, and the battle spread to one area after another.

In the end, Ye Tian still consumed the other party.

"This piece is so big!"

Ye Tian took this piece of the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule Fragment, and sensed the extremely rich Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule Origin inside, such an Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule Fragment was far more valuable than any fragment obtained before.

In the following years, Ye Tian used the secret technique of the Great Ghost River to find the strange objects of the Supreme Dao in the depths of the Dragon Yin Domain, kill them one by one, and obtain the fragments of the eighth sequence of the Supreme Dao rules.

Gradually, he also gathered eighty-one fragments of the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, of which there were sixteen fragments of the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules on the Fifth Rank Dao Realm to the Dao Strange Creatures alone.

Thereupon.

He then set up the Dodge Array here.

Moreover, due to the quality of the fragments of the eighth sequence of the Supreme Dao Rules, the effect of the Supreme Dao Strange Array arranged this time was increased by nearly five times.

"With the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule Fragment here, I can definitely raise the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule to a ten-percent consummation realm in a short period of time!" Ye Tian muttered.

The years passed.

One solstice year after another has passed.

On the battlefield of the True Dao Domain, the major forces and the Supreme Dao Void Demon also fought more and more fiercely, and many large-scale wars broke out during this period, all of which were defeated by the Aether Su Palace and other forces.

However, every time Ye Tian sneaked into the Supreme Dao Void Demon and carried out great destruction, he made the Supreme Dao Void Demon withdraw many times, which made the losses of the major forces smaller.

And over the years, Ye Tian has accumulated too many military exploits, and it has reached more than one million.

It can be seen how many Supreme Dao Void Demons he has killed, if it weren't for him, Taisu Palace and other forces might be about to collapse.

In the blink of an eye, three million solstice years have passed, which is also close to a solstice era.

this day.

Ye Tian's Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule had already been raised to a ten-percent realm.

Moreover, he had killed so many Supreme Dao Void Demons, and with the Heaven and Earth Origin Gift he had obtained and the improvement of resources, his current cultivation had already reached the late stage of the Dual Dao Realm, and he was one step away from the peak of the Second Dao Realm.
